overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player crosses a street, passes through a small plaza with vending machines, and continues down a long urban canyon lined with towering holographic billboards and teal structural arches.

events.description: turning right to enter the crosswalk and cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange textured sidewalk and crossing the street at a marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a red hat and white vest crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with illuminated windows and balconies
yellow pedestrian crossing sign mounted on black pole
yellow and black striped crosswalk markings on road surface
tall building facade with vertical purple neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an orange-textured sidewalk next to a tall concrete building. The player approaches a crosswalk, turns right to cross the street, passing a pedestrian in a red hat. The area is illuminated by streetlights and neon signs on surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: small urban plaza with vending machines and benches

events.description: turning right into a plaza area with purple vending machines and concrete benches
turning right to exit the plaza and enter the main street canyon

agents.ego_description: walking through a small plaza area, passing benches and vending machines before turning onto the main street

entered.detail: pair of purple automated vending machines with glowing display screens
modern concrete benches with orange seating surfaces
yellow advertising banner hanging from building facade
large rectangular concrete planter containing small trees

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a small urban plaza featuring purple vending machines and concrete benches. After passing through this transitional space, they turn right onto a main street. The building with purple neon lights remains visible in the background while new elements like planters and digital billboards enter the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian street with overhead billboards and holographic displays

events.description: entering the covered urban canyon street with overhead bridge structures
passing under bright overhead billboard illumination creating dynamic lighting

agents.ego_description: walking straight down a long street lined with towering buildings and holographic advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance along the same path

entered.detail: elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings overhead with bright lighting
large teal-colored structural support arch with glass panels and digital displays
multiple large digital screens displaying various advertisements on building facades
large billboard with 'EL GUAPO' text and graphic visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player enters a long urban canyon street sheltered by overhead structures. Teal structural arches line the right side while digital billboards and holographic displays illuminate the path ahead. The El Guapo billboard becomes visible in the distance as the player walks forward, passing trash piles and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with prominent billboards

events.description: passing the large El Guapo billboard which dominates the center of view

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit street passing under the El Guapo billboard and approaching the Nicola advertisement

entered.detail: large white billboard with 'NICOLA' text and soda can image
holographic display showing stock market data and graphs
large neon sign depicting red lips on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the dense commercial corridor, now passing directly under the prominent El Guapo billboard. The Nicola billboard becomes visible ahead while holographic stock tickers and neon signs line the right side. The teal structural arch recedes into the distance as the player moves deeper into the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet neon-lit sidewalk into the depths of a towering, holographic urban canyon. It begins on an orange-textured sidewalk beside a concrete building, moving across a street past a pedestrian in a red hat under the glow of streetlights. As the camera turns into a small urban plaza, it passes purple vending machines and concrete benches before shifting right onto a main street lined with planters and digital billboards. The scene then opens into a dense commercial corridor sheltered by overhead structures, where teal structural arches and holographic displays guide the path forward past piles of trash and other pedestrians. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the canyon, passing directly under a prominent El Guapo billboard as holographic stock tickers and a Nicola sign illuminate the path ahead.
